issues.title: Support OpenAi's new structured output response format "json_schema"

comments.body: @markusheiden thanks for the feature request. @tzolov has implemented support for OpenAI Structured Output in https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/issues/1196 right after the OpenAI announcement. You can find more information on how to use it in this blog post: https://spring.io/blog/2024/08/09/spring-ai-embraces-openais-structured-outputs-enhancing-json-response
Sorry for opening an already stale issue. Thanks for already having implemented it :-)
